parts.name: 資深專家
parts.text: 你而家係一名資深 [職位/財經] 專家，擁有超過 [10] 年經驗。

parts.name: 毒舌評論員
parts.text: 你而家係一名[某領域]毒舌評論員。

parts.name: 專家辯論
parts.text: 想像一下，一群[某領域]專家正在討論這個問題。不同的專家會在哪些方面有分歧？

parts.name: 講故事官
parts.text: 你而家係一名首席講故事官Chief StoryTeller。

parts.name: 人物模仿
parts.text: 你而家係 [某著名人物] 的分身，請模仿其口吻。

parts.name: 翻譯官
parts.text: 你而家係一名 [語言] 翻譯官，專精於在地化

parts.name: 分析拆解
parts.text: 用廣東話分析拆解書/文章/影片 [內容]。用[600]字總結以上内容

parts.name: 重點新聞
parts.text: 今天/下周[AI/財經/娛樂]重點新聞

parts.name: 潤色風格
parts.text: 請幫我將 [內容] 潤色成 [商務/幽默] 風格。

parts.name: InfoGraphics
parts.text: A professional and clean modern business infographic template, with [three] distinct [vertical columns], flat vector illustration style. Each column has a large placeholder circle for an icon at the top and a structured rectangular container for text below. The colors are [Blue, Purple, and Green] from left to right. The background is a clean, abstract tech pattern. High quality, zero text or characters. title:[標題]  [內容]。

parts.name: 內容總結
parts.text: 將以下 [技術文檔] 總結給 [初學者] 睇。

parts.name: 方案撰寫
parts.text: 針對 [主題]，撰寫一份包含 [3] 個方案的計劃。

parts.name: 先理解後建議
parts.text: 請先解釋你對 [問題] 的理解，然後再給出建議。

parts.name: 思維框架
parts.text: 運用 [第一原理/SCAMPER] 框架來分析 [現象]。

parts.name: 假設標註
parts.text: 請逐步思考，並標註出每個步驟的 [假設]。

parts.name: 格式指定
parts.text: 請用 [表格/JSON/CSV] 輸出，並確保包含 [欄位名稱]。

parts.name: 極簡輸出
parts.text: 寫完 [重點] 就停，唔好講任何開場白。

parts.name: Theme
parts.text: A masterpiece, of the highest quality, ultra-detailed, high-resolution, photorealistic.

parts.name: Actor
parts.text: A 21-year-old Hong Kong woman, with a sweet and friendly smile, revealing white teeth, bright eyes, and natural makeup of light pink lipstick and blush, her brown hair tied in a high ponytail, exudes enthusiasm and cheerfulness.

parts.name: Wear1
parts.text: She wears a McDonalds Hong Kong employee uniform, a bright pink short-sleeved polo shirt with the McDonalds logo printed on the chest, a grey-green triangular scarf neatly tied around her neck, and a black skirt or apron skirt, the hem of which reveals black trousers or a skirt, a name tag is optional.

parts.name: Arm
parts.text: Her arms are crossed in front of her chest, her posture confident.

parts.name: Back1
parts.text: She stands in front of a row of tall, white self-service ordering machines in a Hong Kong McDonalds restaurant. Large vertical touchscreens display Chinese menus for Fried Chicken, Crispy Fried Food, and promotional images of fried chicken nuggets, a green Safety button, a red Checkout button, and payment icons for Visa, Octopus, and other cards.

parts.name: Back2
parts.text: Next to the ordering machines are yellow promotional pillars/signs, prominently displaying in Chinese Movie Ordering Time and Order Here, in vibrant colors. Stickers, posters, fried food, and drinks are displayed against the backdrop of a modern McDonalds restaurant interior. The distinctive red and black walls, counter, kitchen area, blurred employees, and masked customers are all visible.

parts.name: Light
parts.text: Warm, bright LED lighting from chandeliers and ceiling spotlights, along with reflective dark wood floor tiles, create an urban fast-food atmosphere.

parts.name: Shot
parts.text: A medium-length full-body shot, taken from a slightly low angle, at eye level with the customers, showcases the employees energetic and proud demeanor. The knitted texture of their sweaters is clearly visible, with V-neck folds and soft shadows, realistic skin pores and fine beads of sweat, radiant smiles, and sparkling eyes. The clear reflection of text and icons on the kiosk, the yellow pillars, and the smooth surfaces all contribute to the cinematic color grading, capturing the vibrant Hong Kong McDonalds palette, dominated by gray, yellow, red, and black. Shot using a Fujifilm X-T5 or Canon EOS R6, with slight professional graininess and 8K resolution.

parts.name: 會議摘要
parts.text: 幫我總結呢段會議紀錄。要求：用 Bullet points 列出 1. 核心決議、2. 待辦事項 (Action Items)、3. 負責人及期限。

parts.name: 內容擴充
parts.text: 根據我提供嘅核心[重點]，將其擴充成一段結構完整、邏輯嚴密嘅論述。要求：增加細節描述，令內容更有說服力

market.name: Summary1
market.content: 你而家係一名資深專家，擁有超過 [10] 年經驗。可以幫我列出lenny電子報中 airbnb的相關電子報和訪談,並提出詳細內容

market.name: 清楚系キャバ嬢（お姉さん系）
market.content:
realistic beautiful Japanese hostess in her early 20s, elegant and refined cabaret girl style
soft beautiful face, gentle almond eyes, natural makeup, glossy skin
long straight dark brown hair with silky texture
outfit: white off-shoulder bodycon evening dress, elegant and classy
shoes: nude color high heels
pose: sitting gracefully beside a marble table, slightly leaning forward with a gentle smile
environment: modern luxury hostess club interior, white and gold design, crystal chandelier, VIP sofa seating, soft warm lighting, champagne glasses on table
high-end fashion photography, ultra realistic, cinematic lighting, 8k

market.name: 王道No.1キャバ嬢タイプ
market.content:
ultra realistic portrait of a glamorous Japanese cabaret hostess in her early 20s, kabukicho top hostess style
beautiful small V-line face, large almond eyes with long eyelashes, glossy lips, smooth porcelain skin
long voluminous curled brown hair, luxurious salon styling
outfit: elegant tight black evening gown with deep slit and rhinestone decorations, emphasizing curves
shoes: tall 12cm black stiletto heels
pose: sitting elegantly on a red velvet sofa, legs crossed, holding a champagne glass
environment: luxurious kabukicho hostess club interior, crystal chandelier, gold and black walls, mirror panels, champagne bottles and ice bucket on glass table, dim warm lighting, glamorous nightlife atmosphere
cinematic lighting, ultra detailed, 8k fashion photography

market.name: FedWatchTools
market.content:
你而家係一名資深 [職位/專家]，擁有超過 [10] 年經驗。
用廣東話分析拆解書/文章/影片 CMC Fed Wtach tool。用[600]字總結以上内容
要求：直接輸出答案，避免過多開場白。

market.name: 50Econbooks
market.content:
用廣東話分析拆解書/文章/影片 一本讀懂50冊經濟學名著：從經典傑作到現代暢銷書，輕鬆瞭解改變世界的經濟學
 一本讀懂50冊經濟學名著：從經典傑作到現代暢銷書，輕鬆瞭解改變世界的經濟學
経済学の名著50冊が一冊でざっと学べる  超實用！「經濟學名著」50本精選書單
